Article.ArticleTitle: Promoting antimicrobial stewardship on dairy farms in Mekelle, Northern Ethiopia: a field intervention with One Health implications.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Veterinary Basics and Diagnostic Sciences, College of Veterinary Sciences, Mekelle University, Mekelle, Ethiopia. haftom.yirga@mu.edu.et.
Department of Veterinary Basics and Diagnostic Sciences, College of Veterinary Sciences, Mekelle University, Mekelle, Ethiopia.
Department of Veterinary Clinical Medicine and Epidemiology, College of Veterinary Sciences, Mekelle University, Mekelle, Ethiopia.
Department of Veterinary Basics and Diagnostic Sciences, College of Veterinary Sciences, Mekelle University, Mekelle, Ethiopia.
Department of Veterinary Basics and Diagnostic Sciences, College of Veterinary Sciences, Mekelle University, Mekelle, Ethiopia.
Doctoral School of Biology and Environmental Sciences, University of Debrecen, Debrecen, Hungary.

Grant.Agency: Norwegian University of Life Sciences (NMBU) under the MU-HU-NMBU-ICP V Research Projects

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethics approval and consent to participate: This study was reviewed and approved by Mekelle University, College of Veterinary Sciences Research and Ethics Review Committee. All the participating farm owners and workers were informed about the study objectives and procedures, and written informed consent was obtained before data collection. Participation was voluntary, and all the data were anonymized to ensure confidentiality. Consent for publication: Not applicable. Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests.
